Class RmiClientConnection

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiClientConnection
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClientConnection
public class RmiClientConnection extends Object implements ClientConnection
Per-client server-side connection object used by RMI sessions.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RmiClientConnection(String nickname, ClientCallbackRemote callback, Lobby lobby, GameRoom room, Runnable onDisconnected)
    Creates a new RMI client connection wrapper.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    activate()
    Starts observing game state changes for this client.
    void
    disconnect()
    Disconnects the client and removes listeners.

    Returns the timestamp of the last activity registered on this connection.

    isConnected()
     
    void

    Registers that this client produced activity.

    Sends a game update to the remote client.

    Sends login outcome to the client.

    Sends a controller response to the client.

  • Constructor Details

    • RmiClientConnection

      public RmiClientConnection(String nickname, ClientCallbackRemote callback, Lobby lobby, GameRoom room, Runnable onDisconnected)
      Creates a new RMI client connection wrapper.
      Parameters:
      nickname - player nickname.
      callback - client callback endpoint.
      lobby - server lobby.
      room - the game room the client is connected to.
      onDisconnected - callback invoked once this connection is terminated.

  • Method Details

    • activate

      public void activate()
      Starts observing game state changes for this client.

    • markActivity

      public void markActivity()
      Registers that this client produced activity.

    • showLoginResult

      public void showLoginResult(boolean success, String message)
      Sends login outcome to the client.
      Parameters:
      success - true if login succeeds.
      message - message to display.

    • showMessage

      public void showMessage(String message)
      Sends a controller response to the client.
      Parameters:
      message - response text.

    • isConnected

      public boolean isConnected()
      Returns:
      true if this connection is still active.

    • getLastActivity

      public long getLastActivity()
      Returns the timestamp of the last activity registered on this connection.
      Specified by:
      getLastActivity in interface ClientConnection
      Returns:
      The last activity timestamp.

    • sendToClient

      public void sendToClient(SerializedUpdate update)
      Sends a game update to the remote client.
      Specified by:
      sendToClient in interface ClientConnection
      Parameters:
      update - The serialized update to send.

    • disconnect

      public void disconnect()
      Disconnects the client and removes listeners.
      Specified by:
      disconnect in interface ClientConnection
